*Student Profile Class Definition*
The C++ class named UndergraduateStudent encapsulates the essential data for a university student. It includes a string variable for the complete legal name and a unique integer identifier for each individual record.

*Academic Performance Metric*
A double-precision variable stores the cumulative grade point average to track academic success with high precision. This metric is crucial for evaluating scholarship eligibility and graduation standing.

*Constructor Implementation*
The constructor initializes all member variables to ensure that every new student object has a valid name, ID, and starting GPA value upon creation.

*Data Encapsulation Strategy*
Private access modifiers protect the internal data while public getter functions allow safe retrieval of the student's profile information without exposing the raw memory.
